FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Inflation Fears and Fed Leadership Transition Bolster Dollar Strength
tldr_points: Powell departure fuels uncertainty, supporting USD bid
Rising Treasury yields reinforce dollar carry advantage
Risk-off flows from equity weakness favor USD over JPY
FX.excerpt: Dollar strengthens on Fed uncertainty and yield differential expansion; tactical long bias warranted
FX.comment: Dollar strength driven by yield differentials and Fed uncertainty; buy dips toward MA20 support

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Bullish Structure Intact Despite Policy Uncertainty
tldr_points: S&P 500 maintains constructive technical structure above key moving averages
Fed policy pivot under new leadership creates opportunity rather than threat
Sector rotation favors quality fundamentals despite headline uncertainty
STOCKS.excerpt: Bullish bias remains as institutional flows support equities; enter on pullbacks toward support
STOCKS.comment: Bullish structure intact; enter on pullback toward MA20 support

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Regulatory Progress & Institutional Adoption Drive Bullish Momentum
tldr_points: Harvard's shift to BTC while Abu Dhabi increases exposure
Altcoin ETF race intensifies with BNB filings
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC poised for upside as regulatory clarity improves and institutional BTC exposure grows
CRYPTO.comment: Regulatory clarity and institutional accumulation support bullish technical structure
